Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('seller:', d.get\('seller'\)\); print\('Has reviews key:', 'reviews' in d\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; print\('Keys:', [k for k in d.keys\(\)]\); print\('reviews type:', type\(d.get\('reviews'\)\).__name__\); print\('reviews count:', len\(d.get\('reviews', []\)\)\); print\('reviews sample:', d.get\('reviews', [None]\)[0]\); print\('sellerName:', d.get\('sellerName'\)\); print\('sellerFeedback:', d.get\('sellerFeedback'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('所有字段:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\) print\(\) print\('seller 字段:', json.dumps\(d.get\('seller'\), indent=2\)\) print\(\) print\('有 reviews 字段?', 'reviews' in d\) print\('有 ratings 字段?', 'ratings' in d\) print\('有 feedback 字段?', 'feedback' in d\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0] print\('sellerName:', d.get\('sellerName'\)\) print\('reviews 数量:', len\(d.get\('reviews', []\)\)\) print\('reviews 示例:'\) for r in d.get\('reviews', []\)[:2]: print\(f' {r[\\"username\\"]} | {r[\\"rating\\"]}星 | verified={r[\\"verified\\"]} | {r[\\"text\\"][:50]}'\) ")
